{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Kelthriss of the Burning Rain
| aliases = Kelthriss
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]]
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Kelthriss of the Burning Rain]] has thick skin the deep navy of an ocean.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c35">''The Engineer'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Kelthriss is a member of [[the Perfected]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c35" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
